title: anisochilus carnosus
intro: Anisochilus carnosus, also known as bai hua she in Chinese and sweet root in English, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anisochilus carnosus include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and fever, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, Anisochilus carnosus is often used as a tea, tincture, or powder, and can also be applied topically to the skin for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
